prompt: Create a photorealistic cinematic image of a rustic wooden water trough in a lush shaded forest, filled with clear cold spring water and exactly 25 floating ripe tomatoes. A hollow bamboo spout enters from the upper left, pouring a continuous stream of water into the trough, creating ripples, bubbles, sparkle, and small surface splashes around the tomatoes. The tomatoes should vary slightly in size and ripeness, mostly glossy red with some orange-yellow patches, green stems visible, partially submerged and clustered across the water surface. The trough is made of dark wet aged wood with thick rectangular sides, seen from a close three-quarter overhead angle. Surround it with mossy rocks, green leaves, ferns, tree roots, and a vertical weathered wooden post in the background. Use natural dappled sunlight filtering through foliage, bright highlights on the water and tomato skins, soft green forest shadows, humid summer atmosphere, realistic reflections, shallow depth of field, high dynamic range, Lightroom-style color grading with rich greens and warm reds, no people, no text, no labels, no artificial objects beyond the bamboo spout and wooden trough.
